{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-55747", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-23", "name": "Relative Path Traversal"}], "description": "### Impact

It's possible to get access and read configuration files by using URLs such as http://localhost:8080/xwiki/webjars/wiki%3Axwiki/..%2F..%2F..%2F..%2F..%2FWEB-INF%2Fxwiki.cfg. The trick here is to encode the / which is decoded when parsing the URL segment, but not re-encoded when assembling the file path.

### Patches

This has been patched in 17.4.0-rc-1, 16.10.7.

### Workarounds

There is no known workaround, other than upgrading XWiki.

### References

* https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XWIKI-19350
* https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/commit/9e7b4c03f2143978d891109a17159f73d4cdd318#diff-45ea9c87d5fb68cd5db0da7f78cf25e76f1325f5fe56e21618b21786fc706236R80-R81

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:
* Open an issue in [Jira XWiki.org](https://jira.xwiki.org/)
* Email us at [Security Mailing List](mailto:security@xwiki.org)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01557, "percentile": 0.71959}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-09-03T17:42:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-55747"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-09-03T21:15:31Z", "published_at": "2025-09-03T17:42:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/security/advisories/GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7", "https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/commit/9e7b4c03f2143978d891109a17159f73d4cdd318#diff-45ea9c87d5fb68cd5db0da7f78cf25e76f1325f5fe56e21618b21786fc706236R80-R81", "https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XWIKI-19350", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-55747", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/xwiki/xwiki-platform/security-advisories/GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform", "summary": "XWiki configuration files can be accessed through the webjars API", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T23:17:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qww7-89xh-x7m7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "16.10.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-webjars-api"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 7.1.4, < 16.10.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "17.4.0-rc-1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-webjars-api"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 17.0.0-rc-1, < 17.4.0-rc-1"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-webjars"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.1-miletone-2, <= 7.1.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: XWiki configuration files can be accessed through the webjars API
